query:
-- Backfill gameNumber for the HOU@BAL doubleheader bets on 2026-04-30
-- Bet 60003: anGameId=287818 = G2 (HOU won 11-5, created second = later game)
-- Bet 60004: anGameId=290399 = G1 (BAL won 10-3, created first = earlier game)
-- Determine G1 vs G2 by: lower anGameId = earlier game = G1
-- 287818 < 290399 → bet 60003 (anGameId=287818) = G1, bet 60004 (anGameId=290399) = G2
-- Wait — need to verify by actual game time. Let's check all DH bets first.
SELECT id, away_team, home_team, game_date, an_game_id, game_number, result, odds
FROM tracked_bets
WHERE game_date = '2026-04-30' AND away_team = 'HOU' AND home_team = 'BAL'
ORDER BY an_game_id ASC;
